June 22, 2026
Happy Birthday, Frankee ♡

I am so honored to be able to be here with you in your 21st and I'm so very proud of you.

After all these years together I see you. I see your character your beauty inside and out and how capable you are with everything you can handle. Your faith and strength is admirable to me. How you pushed through everything that came your way and with your persistence and faith you did it baby.

You went another year doing your best and it showed. You're so beautiful as years go by an expensive wine as tall as one too. You're perfection if they had a person to make example of. Many more to say many more to come you're amazing!

Honey pie you are loved by me and everyone (more love from me obviously hehe) but nevertheless I'm proud of my baby girl and I love you. 🌹

forever yours,
Koibito
🍒   🌹   🍒   🌹   🍒
